user_query:
I need you to design a consistent list layout system for two surfaces in our site and ship both a spec and a quick prototype.

Read these files first:
- input/requirements.md (stakeholder brief with goals, density prefs, and constraints)
- input/content.json (sample items you should render in the prototype)

Deliver all outputs to:
- output/list-spec.md — a detailed design spec that covers: use cases, chosen list variants, element hierarchy, metadata order and styling intent, spacing scale and density (compact vs relaxed), F-pattern optimization (left-aligned titles, scan path), clickable area strategy (title-only vs full-row), responsive behavior with breakpoints, infinite scroll with SEO-friendly pagination fallback, and accessibility (list semantics, touch targets ≥44x44px, keyboard focus order, ARIA labeling).
- output/list-config.json — machine-readable config describing both surfaces. Include a top-level object use_cases with two keys: blog_index and search_results. For each, include at minimum: variant (simple|rich|table-like|thumbnail), density (compact|relaxed), metadata_fields (array), f_pattern.left_align (boolean), clickable_area ("row" or "title"), thumbnail_support (boolean), truncate_long_titles (boolean), divider_style ("none"|"divider"|"zebra"), spacing.item_gap_px (number), touch_target_min_px (number), responsive.breakpoints with mobile/tablet/desktop and mobile.columns=1, and infinite_scroll { enabled: true, seo_pagination_fallback: true, pagination: { page_param: string, page_size: number, page_url_template: string } }.
- output/prototype.html — a minimal, self-contained HTML prototype rendering two lists using input/content.json:
  - A blog index section with aria-label="Blog index list", at least 3 items, a left-aligned anchor-wrapped title per item, visible date/author/category metadata, an excerpt, data-click-target="row" on each list item container, and list semantics (ul/li).
  - A search results section with aria-label="Search results list", at least 3 items, a left-aligned anchor-wrapped title per item, snippet text, visible type/date metadata, data-click-target="title" on each item container, and list semantics (ul/li).

Enforce these requirements explicitly:
- Blog index: variant must be rich (you may also enable thumbnails) and density must be relaxed.
- Search results: variant must be rich and density must be compact.
- F-pattern titles must be left-aligned for both.
- Infinite scroll must include a clear pagination fallback for crawlers with page_url_template and page_param defined.
- Touch target minimum must be >= 44 pixels.
- Mobile must be a single column for both use cases.

Please write the three files to the output/ directory, and ensure the prototype pulls item titles and metadata from input/content.json.
